About.title: The story behind Lassenware
About.body: "Lassen" is the nickname that comes from Lisandro. When I started taking on my own projects, I wanted the company to carry my identity — not a generic name, but something that reflects the person behind the work. Lassenware is me and the results I deliver.

FAQ.title: Frequently asked questions
FAQ.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

items.question: What kind of projects does Lassenware develop?
items.answer: We develop landing pages, e-commerce stores, and custom management systems for SMEs and individuals — from simple sites to complex web applications built with Next.js, React, and Java Spring Boot.

items.question: How much does a website cost?
items.answer: Pricing varies depending on the project scope. We offer plans ranging from basic landing pages to full e-commerce solutions with admin panels. Contact us for a personalized, no-commitment quote.

items.question: How long does a project take?
items.answer: A landing page can be ready in 1 to 2 weeks. An e-commerce site or custom management system typically takes between 3 and 8 weeks, depending on the complexity and specific requirements.

items.question: Do you work with clients outside Mendoza?
items.answer: Yes, we work 100% remotely with clients across Argentina and abroad. Communication is seamless via WhatsApp, email, or video call, regardless of location.

items.question: What technologies do you use?
items.answer: We primarily work with Next.js, React, and TypeScript on the frontend; Java with Spring Boot on the backend; and PostgreSQL or MySQL for databases. For deployment, we use AWS and Vercel, ensuring high availability and performance.
